query:
SELECT 
  c.id as campaign_id, 
  c.title, 
  c.moodBoardPrimaryImageUrl,
  COUNT(mb.id) as mood_board_image_count,
  COUNT(cs.id) as shot_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cs.status = 'complete' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as complete_shots
FROM campaigns c
LEFT JOIN campaign_mood_board_images mb ON mb.campaignId = c.id
LEFT JOIN campaign_shots cs ON cs.campaignId = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.title, c.moodBoardPrimaryImageUrl
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
